target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no discernible intact components; structural frame is melted and collapsed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; all doors, roof, and chassis are destroyed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

summary: Two military equipment targets are confirmed destroyed, both exhibiting catastrophic (K-kill) damage with completely charred and melted structural frames. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area littered with the wreckage of multiple vehicles, including the two destroyed ones, with soldiers standing nearby. The destruction of these vehicles indicates a significant loss of mobility and operational capability in the area.
